name: Persistent Systems Limited
summary: Persistent Systems Limited provides software products, services, and technology solutions. The company operates through three segments: Banking, Financial Services and Insurance (BFSI), Healthcare & Life Sciences, and Technology Companies and Emerging Verticals. It provides Persistent Digital Banking and Credit Union Solution, and Loan Originating Solution; Digital Insurance Solutions, comprising claims lifecycle management automation, CX transformation for insurance, and integrated wellness and care solution for insurance; and Persistent trade finance automation. The company also offers Persistent Patient Mobile App for enhanced efficiency, patient experience, and care co-ordination; digital care pathways; Denials Management for measuring performance reimbursement, identifying payment errors, and streamlining collections; and digital device and diagnostics, digital lab, and research collaboration. Additionally, it provides product life management and systems engineering solutions; and digital manufacturing solutions comprising Dassault Planning and Optimization Software and Dassault manufacturing and operations software. Further, the company offers Network Assurance and Performance Management, and 5G AI Operations and Management solutions; and Mobile Edge Cloud Accelerators, Network API Optimization, and digital product engineering service, as well as provides software innovation and engineering services. It serves customers in the banking, financial services, insurance, health care and life science, software and hi-tech, and telecom and media sectors. It has operations in India, South Africa, Japan, Israel, Malaysia, Singapore, Sri Lanka, Australia, England, France, Germany, Ireland, the Netherlands, Switzerland, Canada, Mexico, and the United States. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Pune, India.
